raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Week-two pulse","name":"What's been most on your mind at work this week, Riley?","description":"Gives Riley room to set the agenda before any onboarding friction is named.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"settling","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Ownership boundaries","name":"Where do the ownership boundaries still feel fuzzy for you, Riley?","description":"Surfaces where he may be unsure what he should drive versus escalate or coordinate.","purpose":"topic","stage":"orientation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Good means what","name":"What does good look like in your role here right now, Riley?","description":"Checks whether he has a working model of expectations for his level.","purpose":"topic","stage":"orientation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Context gaps","name":"What context are you still missing before you make bigger calls, Riley?","description":"Finds the places where he may be filling in gaps from docs instead of team norms.","purpose":"topic","stage":"blockers","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Ask early","name":"When you hit uncertainty, where do you go first for team context?","description":"Surfaces whether he has the right people and channels for getting unstuck quickly.","purpose":"competency","stage":"blockers","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Incident map","name":"How clear are you on who to loop in during an incident, Riley?","description":"Checks his read on escalation norms under pressure without turning it into a test.","purpose":"competency","stage":"blockers","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Team contact","name":"Who have you had the most useful direct contact with so far, Riley?","description":"Shows whether his onboarding is still too doc-heavy and where relationships are thin.","purpose":"topic","stage":"connection","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support needed","name":"What would be most useful from me over the next couple of weeks, Riley?","description":"Converts missing context into a concrete manager support plan.","purpose":"topic","stage":"connection","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Decision examples","name":"Can you walk me through one recent decision where you had to infer the team norm?","description":"Reveals how he is translating docs into actual operating practice.","purpose":"competency","stage":"orientation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next-step landing","name":"Given what we've covered, what should we tighten up before our next check-in?","description":"Closes on concrete follow-up and keeps the meeting moving toward action.","purpose":"topic","stage":"connection","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]}]}
